# session opener prompt for session-002 on the story "poc".

the "trivial-naming-question" for "JOSYN.Contract" leads to deeper architectural thoughst and decisions:

The Naming shalle not only be a technical namespace, but it shall intuitivly display the archtitectural concepts behind.

the idea behind shell reflect in the naming. no over-thinking. human-commuincation is relevant.

## the idea

Foundatoin is one logical group. stable. no feature-evolution. theoratically non-JOSYN.

Than the System:

FontEnd and BackEnd. Both share their knowledge about the foundation.

and than this one signle "extra": the contract - the JAP-Protocol

## possible soulution

we introduce on new logiccal hierarchy-layer : SYSTEM

So: 
- JOSYN.System.Backend
- JOSYN.System.Frontend
- JOSYN.System.Contract

JOSYN.System.Contract solely contains "IJosynApplicationProtocol.cs"; this evolving contract in form of an C#-Interface. never more. never less.

## discussion

over-thinking?

good idea?

i we agree, take it into the plan for further implementaion and documentation.

store all that then it in the current session-summary
